name: Steak-Caesar Salad
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 15 minutes
1. Trim the beef steak of any excess fat. Cut into 1/4 inch thick strips.
2. In a bowl, combine the beef with crushed garlic, olive oil, and cracked black pepper. Toss to coat evenly.
3. Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat until hot. Add the beef (in batches if necessary) and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes or until the outside is no longer pink. Do not overcook.
4. Remove from the skillet, then season with salt as desired.
5. In a large bowl, combine the cooked beef with lettuce and dressing from the Caesar salad kit. Toss lightly.
6. Sprinkle croutons and grated Parmesan cheese (if using) over the salad.
7. Serve immediately.
Makes 4 servings.
